text:
目標の消失を確認しました。
他の幻創種の反応もありませんし
いったん帰還してください。

/ci1 1 ……なんとかここは守れたみたい
けど、あいつ……ベトールを止めないと
きっとまた別の場所が……

/ci1 1 ……あ、ごめん。
とりあえず、シエラの言うとおり
戻ろっか。

The target has been lost. I'm not picking up
any other phantasms, so come back for now.

/ci1 1 ...It looks like we were able to protect this
area, but... we have to stop Bethor,
or he'll just pop up somewhere else...

/ci1 1 ...Oh, I'm sorry. For now, I guess we should
head back like Xiera said.

……なんとかここは守れたみたい
けど、あいつ……ベトールを止めないと
きっとまた別の場所が……

……あ、ごめん。
とりあえず、シエラの言うとおり

The target has been lost. I'm not picking up
any other phantasms, so come back for now.

...It looks like we were able to protect this
area, but... we have to stop Bethor,
or he'll just pop up somewhere else...

...Oh, I'm sorry. For now, I guess we should
head back like Xiera said.
